subTitle: Clear answers before you book a call.

faqs.question: Do you only build websites?
faqs.answer: No. Dawn Web builds business websites, redesigns unclear or underperforming sites, creates SEO-ready pages, and develops custom web apps such as dashboards, booking tools, portals, and workflow systems.

faqs.question: Can you improve my existing website?
faqs.answer: Yes. If your site looks fine but does not explain your offer, build trust, or generate enough inquiries, we can improve the copy, structure, UX, performance, and technical foundations.

faqs.question: Will my website be SEO-ready?
faqs.answer: Yes. SEO-ready builds include the technical basics that are easy to miss: metadata, page structure, crawlable links, schema, sitemap setup, and performance-focused development.

faqs.question: Who will I communicate with?
faqs.answer: You communicate directly with the founder during planning and delivery, so your feedback is not filtered through layers of account management.

faqs.question: What happens after the free consultation?
faqs.answer: We review your goals, current website or idea, timeline, and best next step. If there is a fit, you receive a clear proposal before any build begins.
